subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! Thy petition hath come, and from it wafteth the fragrance of love for the Beloved of all worlds. Render praise unto the Lord of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق عریضه ات حاضر و عرف محبت محبوب عالمیان از او متضوع حمد کن مقصود عالم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Greatest Name
